entries.title: Tesla just increased its spending plan to $25B — here’s where the money is going
entries.description: Tesla's planned capex for 2026 is three times higher than what the company has historically spent. Its CFO said, as a result, Tesla will have a negative free cash flow the rest of the year.

entries.title: Google updates Workspace to make AI your new office intern
entries.description: Google has introduced a host of new automated functions into Workspace, all of which are driven by Workspace Intelligence, its new AI system.

entries.title: Hands on with X’s new AI-powered custom feeds
entries.description: X's AI-powered custom timelines are replacing Communities, with Grok-curated feeds...and new ad slots.

entries.title: How SpaceX preempted a $2B fundraise with a $60B buyout offer
entries.description: Cursor was on track to close a $2 billion funding round this week but chose to halt discussions after SpaceX offered a $10 billion "collaboration fee" and a path to a $60 billion acquisition.

entries.title: Google Cloud launches two new AI chips to compete with Nvidia
entries.description: Google's newest TPUs are faster and cheaper than the previous versions. But the company is still embracing Nvidia in its cloud — for now.

entries.title: Google turns Chrome into an AI co-worker for the workplace
entries.description: Google brings Gemini-powered "auto browse" capabilities to Chrome for enterprise users, letting workers automate tasks like research, data entry, and more.

entries.title: Google makes an interesting choice with its new agent-building tool for enterprises
entries.description: Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform takes an interesting approach: It is geared for IT and technical users.

entries.title: AI Overviews are coming to your Gmail at work
entries.description: The AI Overviews will offer instant summaries pulled from across multiple emails.

entries.title: OpenAI teams up with Infosys to bring AI tools to more businesses
entries.description: Infosys said the integration will be used to help its clients modernize software development, automate workflows, and deploy AI systems, initially focusing software engineering, legacy modernization,

entries.title: AI is spitting out more potential drugs than ever. This startup wants to figure out which ones matter.
entries.description: 10x Science has raised a $4.8 million seed round to help pharmaceutical researchers understand complex molecules.

entries.title: Exclusive: Google deepens Thinking Machines Lab ties with new multibillion-dollar deal
entries.description: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab has signed a multibillion-dollar deal with Google Cloud for AI infrastructure powered by Nvidia's latest GB300 chips, TechCrunch has exclusively learned.

entries.title: Google Maps is about to get a big dose of AI
entries.description: The new features, announced at Cloud Next in Las Vegas this week, add generative AI capabilities to Google's mapping platform, giving it enhanced visual and data analytics powers.

entries.title: The most interesting startups showcased at Google Cloud Next 2026
entries.description: Google wants AI startups on its cloud and has showcased a long list of them at its annual conference.

entries.title: Meta will record employees’ keystrokes and use it to train its AI models
entries.description: Meta says that it has a new internal tool that is converting mouse movements and button clicks into data that can train its AI models.

entries.title: Unauthorized group has gained access to Anthropic’s exclusive cyber tool Mythos, report claims
entries.description: Anthropic told TechCrunch it is investigating the claims, but maintains that there is no evidence that its systems have been impacted.

entries.title: SpaceX is working with Cursor and has an option to buy the startup for $60B
entries.description: The move could shore up weaknesses at each company, but it also reveals them. Neither Cursor nor xAI has proprietary models that can match the leading offerings from Anthropic and OpenAI — the same co

entries.title: Apple’s John Ternus will run one of the world’s most powerful companies; the job is a minefield
entries.description: Apple's top job comes with almost unrivaled power and money, but it comes with plenty of baggage, too.

entries.title: AI research lab NeoCognition lands $40M seed to build agents that learn like humans
entries.description: Founded by an OSU researcher, the startup is developing AI agents that can become experts in any domain.

entries.title: ChatGPT’s new Images 2.0 model is surprisingly good at generating text
entries.description: ChatGPT Images 2.0, the newest image-generation model from OpenAI, shows just how much AI capabilities have evolved over the last few years.

entries.title: India’s app market is booming — but global platforms are capturing most of the gains
entries.description: Non-gaming apps, led by streaming and AI, are driving growth, even as India's spending per user lags global peers.
